brand.name: Drishya
brand.tagline: See it before you own it

hero.headline: Real Estate,
hero.subheadline: Immersive Tours · Cinematic Videos · Virtual Experiences
hero.body: We turn properties into experiences. Before a single visit, your buyer is already in love — every room felt, every detail seen, every corner explored.
hero.click_hint: Move to look around · Scroll to continue

services.title: What We Create
services.subtitle: Three ways we make your property unforgettable
services.3d_desc: An immersive digital walkthrough of your property — so buyers can explore every room, every detail, from wherever they are. No visit needed to fall in love.
services.vr_desc: Step inside before you step out. On a phone, a laptop, or a headset — buyers feel the space as if they're already standing in it.
services.video_desc: The story your property deserves — golden-hour aerials, sweeping interiors, and a 60-second reel that makes buyers reach for the phone.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: From booking to delivery in days, not weeks
process.step1_desc: Our team arrives at your property with specialist cameras. We capture every corner, every light, every texture. Most properties take 2–4 hours.
process.step2_desc: Our studio processes every detail, transforming the raw capture into a living, breathable digital space — ready within 24–48 hours.
process.step3_desc: We review with you, apply your branding, add space maps and create social media cuts. Your vision, perfected.
process.step4_desc: You receive a shareable link, embed code and all assets — hosted on our servers, WhatsApp-ready from day one.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. No surprises. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.currency_note: All prices in INR. USD equivalent shown in brackets.
pricing.darshana_f2: Experience on any device — phone, laptop or headset

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real estate professionals across India
testimonials.t1_text: The virtual tour doubled our site visit conversions. Buyers were pre-sold before they even arrived. Drishya's work is worth every rupee.
testimonials.t2_text: I've sold properties across India for 12 years. This is the first time technology genuinely gave me an edge. The virtual experience wowed my NRI clients.
testimonials.t3_text: The Sampurna package covered everything — virtual tour, VR experience and the cinematic reel. We used it across Instagram, our website and WhatsApp. Outstanding ROI.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting
faq.q1: Which types of properties do you work with?
faq.a1: We work with all residential and commercial properties — independent houses, villas, apartments, gated communities, commercial plots and under-construction projects.
faq.q2: How long does it take to deliver?
faq.a2: Standard delivery is 3–5 business days after the capture visit. Our express 48-hour service is available for urgent needs.
faq.q3: Do buyers need a VR headset?
faq.a3: No. The virtual experience works in any modern browser on mobile or desktop. A VR headset gives a more immersive experience but is entirely optional.
faq.q4: Can I share the virtual tour on WhatsApp?
faq.a4: Yes — every project includes a short, mobile-optimised link you can share directly on WhatsApp, social media, or embed on your website.
faq.q5: Do you cover areas outside Guntur?
faq.a5: Currently we serve select cities across India. We're expanding rapidly — contact us to check coverage in your city.
faq.q6: Is the pricing negotiable for multiple properties?
faq.a6: Yes. We offer tiered discounts for 3+ properties and monthly retainer contracts. Contact us to discuss a custom arrangement.
faq.q7: What if I'm not satisfied with the output?
faq.a7: The Darshana and Sampurna packages include unlimited revisions. Sparsha includes 1 revision. We work until you're happy.
